title: PipeShare.net sign-up error handling and SMTP docs
description:
Create account on pipeshare.net requires SMTP on the OVH backend to send verification codes. The API no longer exposes raw server configuration errors to end users — customers see a short, branded message instead.

Deploy docs now include GoDaddy Workspace SMTP example vars for /opt/horizon/horizon-backend/.env. Until SMTP is configured, sign-up shows a friendly unavailable message.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net business sign-up. pipeshare.live and existing logins unchanged.
changeLog: Sign-up API returns user-friendly mail errors (code smtp_not_configured).
Login/sign-up page shows styled alert boxes instead of raw pink text.
PipeShare-branded verification email subject when SMTP is configured.
OVH README + .env.example document SMTP setup for sign-up.
